results.justification: Backchannel/filler representation as rare-marker tokens directly covers the rare-marker catalog mechanism.
Joint embedding space aligning dialogue context + backchannel realization covers emission-gate context conditioning.
EXACT TWIN — logit-suppression of unsafe tokens + analysis of suppression-release IS the HADZA-CLICK-ATTEN logit-attenuation + emission-gate mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Bias-Guard per-step gate firing only at sanctioned positions IS the emission-gate G(h_t) > τ release mechanism.
Decoder-level constraint masks + logit biasing IS the per-token rare-marker logit-suppression paradigm.
Mainstream logit-bias -100 ban / +5 boost token control IS the underlying mechanism.
Constrained generation = masking unwanted token logits IS the rare-marker suppression part of HADZA-CLICK-ATTEN.
Discourse-marker evaluation across languages covers the discourse-marker catalog and emission analysis.
